_comment: Runtime feature flags for Crackle. Edited by hand. Re-read from disk each time the value is used, so most changes take effect without a restart (idle scanning is (re)checked each time the arm enters IDLE; look-at mode is checked on every wake word).
_idle_scanning_enabled_help: true  -> arm sweeps its workspace while idle to pre-populate the planning scene. false -> arm stays put and only listens for the wake word.
_look_at_mode_help: How the arm decides where to look after the wake word. 'audio' -> turn toward the audio-localization vector (falls back to doing nothing if no direction is available). 'fixed' -> always turn toward 'fixed_look_direction'.
_fixed_look_direction_help: Point in the link_base frame (metres) the arm looks toward when look_at_mode == 'fixed'. Roughly where a user usually stands.
_handover_help: Geometry for hand_object_to_person (link_base frame). 'radius': EEF distance from base for the initial present pose (m). 'extend': extra distance pushed outward for the final offer pose (m). 'height': EEF height (m). 'rpy' (degrees): gripper orientation — yaw is auto-aimed toward the user with this yaw added as an offset; tune r/p for your gripper so the object is presented upright.
_greeting_help: Geometry for fist_bump / high_five (link_base frame). 'radius': EEF distance from base for the reach (m). 'jab': forward nudge distance for the fist bump (m). 'bump_height'/'five_height': EEF heights for the bump vs the high five (m). 'rpy' (degrees): gripper orientation — yaw is auto-aimed toward the user with this yaw added as an offset; tune r/p for your gripper.
